top_signals.title: Cooler Japan: Firms race for new ways to prevent heatstroke
Ugandan army chief shuts down main independent media group
top_signals.summary: Nation Media Group's television station NTV Uganda and Daily Monitor newspaper will remain closed until further notice, Uganda's army chief said in a series of posts on X.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Data breach exposes up to 14.2 million email logins at six ISPs
top_signals.summary: Japanese telecommunications operator KDDI Corporation disclosed a data breach where threat actors gained access to one of its email systems used by five other internet service providers (ISPs) in the country. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
